title: Garp Invades Hachinosu
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Garp, Unknown person #1, Shanks, Unknown person #2, Blackbeard Pirates, Killer as Garp storms Hachinosu to rescue Koby, bringing SWORD, Blackbeard’s commanders, and pirate island chaos into direct conflict.
scene: Garp storms Hachinosu to rescue Koby, bringing SWORD, Blackbeard’s commanders, and pirate island chaos into direct conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: HACHINOSU - THE PIRATE ISLAND, NEW WORLD

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Havoc at the hive of piracy?!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Cap'n Koby's on the loose!!

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: No kiddin'?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then the commodore's got no claim on YM! His bounty's up for grabs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't ask me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Cross Guild's Footing the Bill!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've got his collection ticket right 'ere! The payout is huge!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: spit it out, how much does his head win us?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's a five-star Bounty?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Each Star's Worth A Chest O' booty. So he's worth around $500 million!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The average navy captain only fetches a single star!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm feeling a tickling sensation on the left side of my chest,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right around where we keep the unsold slaves, NYAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't tell me they're escaping too?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does this mean it's open season on all of 'em, pizzaro-san?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You crazy?! Quit being so bloodthirsty!! ye need them alive, that includes KOBY!!

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard Pirates
dialogue.text: LISTEN, OR ILL TELL TEACH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ACK!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that voice coming from the rock face?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huff.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: THEY KNOW WERE HERE!! LET'S HURRY!!

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.text: NAVY HO CAPTAIN (SWORD MEMBER) KOBY

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We wouldn't have made it this far without you, Captain Koby!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please keep going!! I'll act as a decoy and keep them busy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Thank you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're the best!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't lose track of Koby!! Hunt him down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He's a Saint...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You could just catch him yourself, Pizaro...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shiryu of the rain an invisible man who ate the clear-clear fruit

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: *Corrupt King' Avalo Pizaro an island man who ate the island-island fruit

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nah, teach always gets pissed at me for cousin' too much damage!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nya ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Then can I go?

dialogue.speaker: Vasco Shot
dialogue.text: What do you have in mind, Vasco?

summary: This part advances the Hachinosu Rescue through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
